spec_match.rationale: The simulated table path now runs only when soft-navigation is unsupported; supported browsers update metrics and history from real soft-navigation and largest-contentful-paint observers.

interactive.rationale: Route buttons update the SPA panel, metrics, and history table in fallback mode while preserving the native observer path in supporting browsers.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page still matches the Core Web Vitals per-route framing.

edge_cases.rationale: Feature detection clearly separates the native observer path from the simulated fallback, avoiding metric races.

references.rationale: Includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses showcase tokens for status colors and table/card styling.

summary: The unconditional simulation was isolated behind unsupported-browser detection, real observer callbacks now feed the metric/history UI, and the missing ChromeStatus link was added.
